problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation may resolve Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
